title: thymus pulegioides subsp. montanus
intro: Thymus pulegioides subsp. montanus, also known as Mountain Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus pulegioides plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which make it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mountain Thyme include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. This herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
